mapper.insert: insert into java_files_error (name, user_id, source_folder_id, create_time, update_time, output_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{outputId}, #{path});
insert into java_files_parse(name, create_time, update_time, user_id, source_folder_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{path})
insert into jsp_parse_output (name, user_id, source_folder_id, create_time, update_time, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{path})

insert into jsp_parse_error(name, user_id, source_folder_id, create_time, update_time, jsp_parse_output_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{JspParseOutPutId}, #{path})
insert into web_xml_parse_output (user_id, source_folder_id, name, path, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
insert into persistence_xml_parse_output (user_id, source_folder_id, name, path, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
insert into ejb_jar_xml_parse_output (user_id, source_folder_id, name, path, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
insert into faces_config_xml_parse_output (user_id, source_folder_id, name, path, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
insert into application_xml_parse_output (user_id, source_folder_id, name, path, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
insert into jsf_parse_output (user_id, source_folder_id, name, path, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
insert into pom_xml_parse_output (user_id, source_folder_id, name, path, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update java_files_parse set update_time =#{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update java_files_error set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update jsp_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update jsp_parse_error set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update web_xml_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update persistence_xml_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update ejb_jar_xml_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update faces_config_xml_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update application_xml_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update jsf_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update pom_xml_parse_output set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
